title: Vitamin content
doc_html:
§752.  Vitamin content

No manufacturer, processor, or dealer in oleomargarine in the state shall sell or offer for sale any oleomargarine within this state which does not contain at least nine thousand United States Pharmacopeia Units of vitamin A per pound.
doc_text:
§752.  Vitamin content
No manufacturer, processor, or dealer in oleomargarine in the state shall sell or offer for sale any oleomargarine within this state which does not contain at least nine thousand United States Pharmacopeia Units of vitamin A per pound.
